title: EnphaseTelemetryInterval
description: One telemetry interval as returned by the v4 microinverter, meter, or battery telemetry endpoints.

end_at.description: Unix epoch (seconds) marking the end of this interval (typically 5 or 15 minutes).

devices_reporting.description: Count of devices that contributed to this interval.

powr.description: Average power during the interval, in watts.

enwh.description: Energy produced or consumed during the interval, in watt-hours.

soc.description: Battery state of charge as a percentage (0-100). Only for battery telemetry.

charge.description: Battery charge metrics for the interval.

discharge.description: Battery discharge metrics for the interval.
